short_text: Tymal Mills to Mustafizur, Bowled!! Mills closes out the innings superbly, deceiving Mustafizur with a dipping slower ba
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mustafizur, Bowled!! Mills closes out the innings superbly, deceiving Mustafizur with a dipping slower ball as he charges down to swing. It sneaks through to knock over the stumps. Bangladesh finish with 124.

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, Caught by Buttler!! England take a review for caught-behind. Nurul came down the track there
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, Caught by Buttler!! England take a review for caught-behind. Nurul came down the track there and was taken aback as Mills dug it in short. He's terribly late on the pull, and there's a bit of a scratch there on the glove which is picked up by Ultra-Edge.

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 2 runs, Mills misses a run-out! All he had to do was gather the throw but he barely even got
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 2 runs, Mills misses a run-out! All he had to do was gather the throw but he barely even got a hand. It was a decent throw on the bounce too. A mistimed drive in front of long-on fetches Nurul a couple

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, no run, mistimes this cut to backward point
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, no run, mistimes this cut to backward point

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, no run, well he's got away with this. Slower ball that's very wide, Nurul can't reach out. S
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, no run, well he's got away with this. Slower ball that's very wide, Nurul can't reach out. Should've been called by the umpire

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, , that's very wide outside off. A slower bouncer gone wrong from Mills. They've stolen a bye
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, , that's very wide outside off. A slower bouncer gone wrong from Mills. They've stolen a bye too. Nasum was struggling at the non-striker's end and Buttler fired it across but Mills couldn't collect while running back

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, pitched up outside off, drilled to the left of mid-off where Jordan does well
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, pitched up outside off, drilled to the left of mid-off where Jordan does well

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, , bit of a flourish here from Nasum towards the end of Bangladesh's innings. The over's gone
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, , bit of a flourish here from Nasum towards the end of Bangladesh's innings. The over's gone for 17. Short and wide, probably another googly and Nasum cuts it in the gap between backward point and short third

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, , another six! Almost ran across the stumps there, anticipating the wide googly and that's w
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, , another six! Almost ran across the stumps there, anticipating the wide googly and that's what it was. Swings it to the short boundary backward of square again

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, no run, this one's the leg-break but the line's pretty wide outside off again with Rashid pu
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, no run, this one's the leg-break but the line's pretty wide outside off again with Rashid pushing it through. It dips under Nasum's attempted pull

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, no run, beaten by the googly! Turns away outside off, Nasum swings hard and it's past the ou
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, no run, beaten by the googly! Turns away outside off, Nasum swings hard and it's past the outside edge

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, , the first six of Bangladesh's innings! Flighted up on leg stump, Nasum blasts it over back
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nasum Ahmed, , the first six of Bangladesh's innings! Flighted up on leg stump, Nasum blasts it over backward square

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, just short of deep midwicket as he charges in! Nurul is down the track to a googly an
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, just short of deep midwicket as he charges in! Nurul is down the track to a googly and swings it with the turn. Doesn't quite get hold of it

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, no run, slower one wide of off, back of a length, Nasum throws his bat at it but is beaten a
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, no run, slower one wide of off, back of a length, Nasum throws his bat at it but is beaten again

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, no run, slower ball outside off, Nasum swings and misses
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, no run, slower ball outside off, Nasum swings and misses

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, 2 runs, that's a brilliant effort from Woakes running in from deep third. Doesn't carry thou
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, 2 runs, that's a brilliant effort from Woakes running in from deep third. Doesn't carry though. Good length ball, Nasum swings wildly and the edge flies

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, slower short ball on off, back of the hand, Nurul pulls gently through square leg
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, slower short ball on off, back of the hand, Nurul pulls gently through square leg

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, 1 run, back of a length at the stumps, Nasum hops away from the line and somehow gets bat on
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nasum Ahmed, 1 run, back of a length at the stumps, Nasum hops away from the line and somehow gets bat on it, tapping it through point

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, Caught by Woakes!! Mahedi looks to scoop as Mills slants it in from round the wicket. But t
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, Caught by Woakes!! Mahedi looks to scoop as Mills slants it in from round the wicket. But this one's a slower ball and he's popped it straight to short fine leg. Bangladesh continue to sink.

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, flat on off, back of a length, Mahedi tucks it through square leg
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, flat on off, back of a length, Mahedi tucks it through square leg

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, no run, defended down the pitch on the front foot
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, no run, defended down the pitch on the front foot

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, , advances down, the line's outside off and Mahedi goes with the turn over extra cover. Sma
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, , advances down, the line's outside off and Mahedi goes with the turn over extra cover. Smashes it to the boundary. Played!

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, front of the hand, pushed through on leg, Nurul goes back in the crease and works it
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, front of the hand, pushed through on leg, Nurul goes back in the crease and works it through midwicket

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, back of a length on middle, sliding on, Mahedi turns it into the on-side for one
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, back of a length on middle, sliding on, Mahedi turns it into the on-side for one

short_text: Adil Rashid to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, nudges off the back foot through midwicket
full_text: Adil Rashid to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, nudges off the back foot through midwicket

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, , good length outside off, takes the edge with the angle as Mahedi gets forward to defend a
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, , good length outside off, takes the edge with the angle as Mahedi gets forward to defend and it runs away fine. Rashid dives across at deep third but can't get there

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, no run, short of length on off, back of the hand slower one, Mahedi defends to point
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, no run, short of length on off, back of the hand slower one, Mahedi defends to point

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, short of length outside off, Nurul uses the pace nicely and steers wide of backward p
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, short of length outside off, Nurul uses the pace nicely and steers wide of backward point. Roy makes a flying save. Hasn't stopped it cleanly though, they'll get a single

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, back of a length on middle, Mahedi turns it through square leg
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, back of a length on middle, Mahedi turns it through square leg

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, no run, similar line to the first one. Short of length delivery angling across off, but thi
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahedi Hasan, no run, similar line to the first one. Short of length delivery angling across off, but this is the on-pace delivery from Mills and it's too quick for Mahedi this time

short_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, slower ball on off, short of length, Nurul waits on it before guiding it to third
full_text: Tymal Mills to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, slower ball on off, short of length, Nurul waits on it before guiding it to third

short_text: Livingstone to Mahedi Hasan, no run, flat on off, turning away, Mahedi steers it to point
full_text: Livingstone to Mahedi Hasan, no run, flat on off, turning away, Mahedi steers it to point

short_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, Caught by Woakes!! Flighted up nicely, Mahmudullah charges down looking to loft it down the
full_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, Caught by Woakes!! Flighted up nicely, Mahmudullah charges down looking to loft it down the ground. But there's a bit of turn on this leg-break. It's enough to find a thick edge that loops to backward point. First Rahim, now Mahmudullah - Livingstone's having a great time with the ball.

short_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, drifting in on leg, nicely flighted, Nurul flicks it wide of long-on where the fielde
full_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, drifting in on leg, nicely flighted, Nurul flicks it wide of long-on where the fielder charges across to keep them to a single

short_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, 1 run, punches off the back foot through midwicket
full_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, 1 run, punches off the back foot through midwicket

short_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, no run, floated down leg, Mahmudullah tries paddling it fine but it deflects off the pad to
full_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, no run, floated down leg, Mahmudullah tries paddling it fine but it deflects off the pad to short fine

short_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, clips it off the back foot through square leg
full_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, clips it off the back foot through square leg

short_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, no run, finds the blockhole outside off, Mahmudullah tries to squeeze it away but is beaten
full_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, no run, finds the blockhole outside off, Mahmudullah tries to squeeze it away but is beaten

short_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, no run, overpitched outside off, driven to mid-off
full_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, no run, overpitched outside off, driven to mid-off

short_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, short of length outside off, Nurul punches it to deep point
full_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, short of length outside off, Nurul punches it to deep point

short_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, , sprays this down leg
full_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, , sprays this down leg

short_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, 1 run, slower short ball, takes a while arriving and Mahmudullah helps it down to fine leg when i
full_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, 1 run, slower short ball, takes a while arriving and Mahmudullah helps it down to fine leg when it does

short_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, pitched up on off, Nurul takes a back-and-across step in his crease and knocks it wide of
full_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, pitched up on off, Nurul takes a back-and-across step in his crease and knocks it wide of long-on

short_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, no run, short of length outside off, Nurul tries running it down to deep third but is beaten by t
full_text: Jordan to Nurul Hasan, no run, short of length outside off, Nurul tries running it down to deep third but is beaten by the bounce

short_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, Nervy times for Bangladesh, looks like they're under pressure. Nurul Hasan had played
full_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, Nervy times for Bangladesh, looks like they're under pressure. Nurul Hasan had played this towards point from where the throw came in at the bowler's end. A direct hit and it would have been curtains for Nurul Hasan

short_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 2 runs, clipped through square leg by Nurul Hasan as they get a couple of runs. The throw co
full_text: Livingstone to Nurul Hasan, 2 runs, clipped through square leg by Nurul Hasan as they get a couple of runs. The throw comes in at the keeper's end who takes off the bails, but the battter is in as he drags his bat

short_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, Afif Hossain Run Out!! A huge mixup between the batters and Afif has been run-out at the kee
full_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, Afif Hossain Run Out!! A huge mixup between the batters and Afif has been run-out at the keeper's end. This was mainly due to the misfield by Mills at short fine leg that the batters wanted the second run. But never run-out on a misfield they say, this being the reason. Mills recovers well in time to collect the ball and fire in a throw at Buttler who has plenty of time to take down the bails. It was a floated delivery down the leg side that was glanced to short fine leg by Mahmudullah.  1 run completed.

short_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, byes, 1 run, reverse sweep attempted and the batsman fails to connect. The keeper can't gat
full_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, byes, 1 run, reverse sweep attempted and the batsman fails to connect. The keeper can't gather it as well

short_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, , Back in the crease to slice this through point for a cracking boundary. Gets a fist bump
full_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, , Back in the crease to slice this through point for a cracking boundary. Gets a fist bump from Mahmudullah following that boundary

short_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, 1 run, tad shorter around middle and leg, Mahmudullah knocks it to long-on for one
full_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, 1 run, tad shorter around middle and leg, Mahmudullah knocks it to long-on for one

short_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, 1 run, chance of an overthrow, but they haven't taken it. Good call in the end. Mahmudullah had r
full_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, 1 run, chance of an overthrow, but they haven't taken it. Good call in the end. Mahmudullah had run down the track to steer this in front of short third man from where the throw came in at the keeper's end. The fielder inside the ring fails to stop it, but the man from the deep charges in and denies them the overthrow

short_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, no run, on a length around off, Mahmudullah defends it from within the crease
full_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, no run, on a length around off, Mahmudullah defends it from within the crease

short_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, no run, short and slow outside off, Mahmudullah looks to swing across the line, ends up getting a
full_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, no run, short and slow outside off, Mahmudullah looks to swing across the line, ends up getting a bottom edge, just a faint tickle as the ball lands just in front of the keeper

short_text: Woakes to Afif Hossain, 1 run, on the charge to swat this to mid-off although he doesn't time in. Lack of timing also me
full_text: Woakes to Afif Hossain, 1 run, on the charge to swat this to mid-off although he doesn't time in. Lack of timing also means he can get a single

short_text: Woakes to Afif Hossain, no run, wow! That's a peach by Woakes to welcome the new batter. Hits the deck hard, a well dire
full_text: Woakes to Afif Hossain, no run, wow! That's a peach by Woakes to welcome the new batter. Hits the deck hard, a well directed bouncer and takes evasive action by getting out of the firing line

short_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, 1 run, short of a length around middle and leg, Mahmudullah works it through square leg for one
full_text: Woakes to Mahmudullah, 1 run, short of a length around middle and leg, Mahmudullah works it through square leg for one

short_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, no run, guides this to Livingstone once again
full_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, no run, guides this to Livingstone once again

short_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, no run, tossed up delivery by Livingstone and the batter has squeezed it back to the spinne
full_text: Livingstone to Afif Hossain, no run, tossed up delivery by Livingstone and the batter has squeezed it back to the spinner

short_text: Livingstone to Mushfiqur, Lbw!! Livingstone comes into the attack and strikes in his first over. Gets the set batsman -
full_text: Livingstone to Mushfiqur, Lbw!! Livingstone comes into the attack and strikes in his first over. Gets the set batsman - Mushfiqur Rahim. He was down on his knee to play the reverse sweep, but Livingstone goes full. Beats the batter as the ball goes past the underedge and strikes him on the pads. Pitching on leg, impact on leg and it's crashing into the stumps, reckon the replays. Proving to be another impressive bowling performance by England this.

short_text: Livingstone to Mushfiqur, 2 runs, makes room and chips this loopy delivery to deep extra cover for a couple of runs
full_text: Livingstone to Mushfiqur, 2 runs, makes room and chips this loopy delivery to deep extra cover for a couple of runs

short_text: Livingstone to Mushfiqur, no run, a loopy legbreak on off, Mushfiqur steers this to point. Wants a single, but Mahmudull
full_text: Livingstone to Mushfiqur, no run, a loopy legbreak on off, Mushfiqur steers this to point. Wants a single, but Mahmudullah sends him back

short_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, 1 run, legbreak on a shorter length, Mahmudullah punches it off his back foot to long-off fo
full_text: Livingstone to Mahmudullah, 1 run, legbreak on a shorter length, Mahmudullah punches it off his back foot to long-off for a single

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mushfiqur, 2 runs, that's a really full ball outside off, Mushfiqur slices it past the fielder at point a
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mushfiqur, 2 runs, that's a really full ball outside off, Mushfiqur slices it past the fielder at point and ends the over with a couple of runs. For the first time in the innings, the run rate has touch 6..

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mushfiqur, , Tymal Mills goes short and Mushfiqur hops a touch and guides it over the keeper's head for a
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mushfiqur, , Tymal Mills goes short and Mushfiqur hops a touch and guides it over the keeper's head for a very fine boundary. Third man was too square and had no chance to stop this

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahmudullah, 1 run, at the batter's thigh pad who has worked this through square leg for one
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahmudullah, 1 run, at the batter's thigh pad who has worked this through square leg for one

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, rocks back in the crease to pull this short ball over the man at mid-wicket for a co
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, rocks back in the crease to pull this short ball over the man at mid-wicket for a couple of runs

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mushfiqur, 1 run, on a length outside off, Mushfiqur glides it past the man at backward point and takes a
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mushfiqur, 1 run, on a length outside off, Mushfiqur glides it past the man at backward point and takes a single

short_text: Tymal Mills to Mahmudullah, 1 run, This was played with soft hands in front of short cover by Mahmudullah and it was Rah
full_text: Tymal Mills to Mahmudullah, 1 run, This was played with soft hands in front of short cover by Mahmudullah and it was Rahim who called for the run. Morgan is onto it in a flash as he scores a direct-hit at the keeper's end with an underarm throw, but Rahim is in as he slides his bat to get there

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, no run, turning away from the batter outside off, slightly short as Mushfiqur opens his bat fa
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, no run, turning away from the batter outside off, slightly short as Mushfiqur opens his bat face to glide this to short third man. Wanted a single there, but was sent back by Mahmudullah

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, 1 run, full and quick on middle and leg, Mahmudullah clips it off an inside edge towards squ
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, 1 run, full and quick on middle and leg, Mahmudullah clips it off an inside edge towards square leg

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, no run, short and wide outside off, Mahmudullah goes deep back in the crease to cut it towar
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, no run, short and wide outside off, Mahmudullah goes deep back in the crease to cut it towards point

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, , the Bangladesh skipper joins the act now. Dances down the track and thumps this towards lo
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, , the Bangladesh skipper joins the act now. Dances down the track and thumps this towards long-off where the fielder was slightly square to cut it down

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, 1 run, flatter one on off, slides along the deck as Mushfiqur dabs it towards short third man
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, 1 run, flatter one on off, slides along the deck as Mushfiqur dabs it towards short third man for one

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, 1 run, short and wide again, Mahmudullah camps back in the crease to cut this through cover-
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, 1 run, short and wide again, Mahmudullah camps back in the crease to cut this through cover-point

short_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, 1 run, 137kph, width on offer and Mahmudullah has carved this through cover-point to end the over
full_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, 1 run, 137kph, width on offer and Mahmudullah has carved this through cover-point to end the over with a single

short_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, , short and wide outside off, Mahmudullah throws his hands at it with a flashy cut, gets beaten d
full_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, , short and wide outside off, Mahmudullah throws his hands at it with a flashy cut, gets beaten due to the bounce though

short_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, 1 run, slower one by Jordan, on the shorter side and it has been worked through square leg for one
full_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, 1 run, slower one by Jordan, on the shorter side and it has been worked through square leg for one

short_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, leg byes, 1 run, short ball on middle and leg, Mahmudullah tries to work this away, but the ball
full_text: Jordan to Mahmudullah, leg byes, 1 run, short ball on middle and leg, Mahmudullah tries to work this away, but the ball bounces a tad more than usual and thuds into his thigh pad, before it lobs towards square leg

short_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, 1 run, short and wide outside off, Mushfiqur rocks back and crunches this through cover-point for o
full_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, 1 run, short and wide outside off, Mushfiqur rocks back and crunches this through cover-point for one

short_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, , Goes for a late-cut does Mushfiqur and ends up getting a bottom edge that rockets away to the thi
full_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, , Goes for a late-cut does Mushfiqur and ends up getting a bottom edge that rockets away to the third man fence. Bangladesh need a few more of these boundaries, doesn't matter how they come

short_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, , fired down the leg-side by Jordan, Mushfiqur tries to flick it away, but doesn't connect. Buttler
full_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, , fired down the leg-side by Jordan, Mushfiqur tries to flick it away, but doesn't connect. Buttler appeals for a caught behind, but the umpire has signalled a wide instead

short_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, 2 runs, short of a length outside off, keeps straight and Mushfiqur cuts it to square third man for
full_text: Jordan to Mushfiqur, 2 runs, short of a length outside off, keeps straight and Mushfiqur cuts it to square third man for a couple of runs

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, no run, tad short and quick around off, Mahmudullah's cut finds the fielder at point
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, no run, tad short and quick around off, Mahmudullah's cut finds the fielder at point

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, 1 run, makes room and lofts this loopy delivery to wide long-off for a single
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, 1 run, makes room and lofts this loopy delivery to wide long-off for a single

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, 1 run, eased down to long-off for a single as Adil Rashid goes full
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mahmudullah, 1 run, eased down to long-off for a single as Adil Rashid goes full

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, 1 run, Could have been blinder had Mills managed to grab that. He was airborne as he tried to
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, 1 run, Could have been blinder had Mills managed to grab that. He was airborne as he tried to get his right hand to it with a leap. Was an aerial reverse sweep played by Mushfiqur, gets a life though. Harsh to call that a dropped catch, but technically it will go down as one

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, no run, that's a legbreak from Adil Rashid and Mushfiqur has guided it back to the spinner
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, no run, that's a legbreak from Adil Rashid and Mushfiqur has guided it back to the spinner

short_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, no run, darted on leg, and it has been clipped towards square leg by Mushfiqur
full_text: Adil Rashid to Mushfiqur, no run, darted on leg, and it has been clipped towards square leg by Mushfiqur

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, 1 run, That's a brilliant start for England. This was a short ball outside off and Mushfiqur opens
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, 1 run, That's a brilliant start for England. This was a short ball outside off and Mushfiqur opens his bat face to glide this down to third man. Bangladesh in need of a partnership

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, 133kph, short and quick on off, Mushfiqur rides the bounce and steers this in front of poin
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, 133kph, short and quick on off, Mushfiqur rides the bounce and steers this in front of point

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, short in length at the batter's pads and Mushfiqur has clipped it in front of short fine le
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, short in length at the batter's pads and Mushfiqur has clipped it in front of short fine leg

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, on a length around off, Mushfiqur knocks it in front of cover-point. Wanted a single there,
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, on a length around off, Mushfiqur knocks it in front of cover-point. Wanted a single there, but Mahmudullah sends him back

short_text: Woakes to Shakib, Caught by Adil Rashid!! That's a fantastic catch by Adil Rashid at short fine leg, charges back, puts
full_text: Woakes to Shakib, Caught by Adil Rashid!! That's a fantastic catch by Adil Rashid at short fine leg, charges back, puts in a dive and takes it before he hits the ground. Bangladesh in deep trouble as their top three are back to the pavilion within the powerplay. Woakes hits the deck hard again, on the shorter side and Shakib goes for a hook, getting a top-edge that results in his downfall. Woakes is absolutely delighted with Rashid's effort there.

short_text: Woakes to Shakib, 2 runs, hits the deck hard, tad shorter and Shakib has whipped it past the fielder at mid-wicket as he
full_text: Woakes to Shakib, 2 runs, hits the deck hard, tad shorter and Shakib has whipped it past the fielder at mid-wicket as he calls for two and gets it comfortably

short_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, , A loopy delivery by Moeen Ali and the batter lofts it straight over the bowler's head. The fie
full_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, , A loopy delivery by Moeen Ali and the batter lofts it straight over the bowler's head. The fielder from mid-on sprints back with a chase, but he's made enough connection to find the fence

short_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, no run, slightly shorter on off, Mushfiqur camps back and chops this to point
full_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, no run, slightly shorter on off, Mushfiqur camps back and chops this to point

full_text: Moeen Ali to Shakib, no run, tries to make room, but Moeen Ali follows him on leg, and it has been squeezed back to the bowler by Shakib

full_text: Moeen Ali to Shakib, no run, slider on middle, keeps a touch low as Shakib defends it from within the crease

full_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, 1 run, 96kph, on the batter's pads who has clipped this through square leg for one

full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, 1 run, 133kph, shorter one around middle and leg, Mushfiqur hooks this through square leg for one

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, bit of bounce there, sharp and quick, Mushfiqur tries to run this down to third man, but ge
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, bit of bounce there, sharp and quick, Mushfiqur tries to run this down to third man, but gets hit on the glove. Nasty blow that and Mushfiqur's in a bit of pain as he removes his gloves to check his hand

short_text: Woakes to Shakib, 1 run, length delivery around middle and leg, quite fast that. Shakib tries to whip it away, and gets
full_text: Woakes to Shakib, 1 run, length delivery around middle and leg, quite fast that. Shakib tries to whip it away, and gets an inside edge onto the pads as the ball rolls towards square leg

short_text: Woakes to Shakib, no run, rides the bounce and knocks it back to Woakes. This was bowled at 139kph by Woakes and Shakib
full_text: Woakes to Shakib, no run, rides the bounce and knocks it back to Woakes. This was bowled at 139kph by Woakes and Shakib eases it down the pitch

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, 1 run, 137kph, short and quick on middle and leg, Mushfiqur gets hurried due to the pace as he swip
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, 1 run, 137kph, short and quick on middle and leg, Mushfiqur gets hurried due to the pace as he swipes it into the pocket at mid-wicket

short_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, short and wide outside off, this ball seams away from the batter, Mushfiqur goes for a flas
full_text: Woakes to Mushfiqur, no run, short and wide outside off, this ball seams away from the batter, Mushfiqur goes for a flashy cut, mistimes it towards the man inside the ring

short_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, 1 run, on the batsman's pads who has worked this through mid-wicket for a single to open his acc
full_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, 1 run, on the batsman's pads who has worked this through mid-wicket for a single to open his account

full_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, no run, rocks back to slice this in front of cover-point

full_text: Moeen Ali to Mushfiqur, no run, floated on off, Mushfiqur knocks it in front of covers

short_text: Moeen Ali to Naim, Caught by Woakes!! Gets both the openers on successive deliveries. Naim looks to loft this tossed up
full_text: Moeen Ali to Naim, Caught by Woakes!! Gets both the openers on successive deliveries. Naim looks to loft this tossed up delivery over mid-on, but doesn't get the elevation. A straightforward chance for Woakes inside the ring and the fielder makes no mistake. Moeen Ali is into the attack in the powerplay and he's inflicting the damage again. This is exactly what he did against West Indies.

short_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, Caught by Livingstone!! Revenge taken by Moeen! Conceded a couple of boundaries in his first ove
full_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, Caught by Livingstone!! Revenge taken by Moeen! Conceded a couple of boundaries in his first over, but he has bounced back to get Liton Das' wicket. The right handed batsman was down on his knee to play the sweep shot, but he can only get a top-edge to it. An easy take for Livingstone at deep square leg and England get an early wicket.

short_text: Moeen Ali to Naim, 1 run, that keeps straight on middle and leg, Naim flicks it with an inside edge towards mid-wicket a
full_text: Moeen Ali to Naim, 1 run, that keeps straight on middle and leg, Naim flicks it with an inside edge towards mid-wicket and hands over the strike to Liton

short_text: Woakes to Liton Das, no run, 130kph, short and quick on off, Liton Das tries to whip it across the line, ends up getting
full_text: Woakes to Liton Das, no run, 130kph, short and quick on off, Liton Das tries to whip it across the line, ends up getting an inside edge that deflects off his pads and lobs towards the on-side. That's a good start by Woakes, concedes only three runs in the over

short_text: Woakes to Liton Das, no run, walks way across in the crease and looks to flick this away. The line was too wide to play
full_text: Woakes to Liton Das, no run, walks way across in the crease and looks to flick this away. The line was too wide to play this shot, struck on the pads, but the impact was way outside off

short_text: Woakes to Naim, 1 run, that's a slower delivery by Woakes, goes full this time around and Naim has driven it to wide mid
full_text: Woakes to Naim, 1 run, that's a slower delivery by Woakes, goes full this time around and Naim has driven it to wide mid-off for a single

short_text: Woakes to Naim, 2 runs, this was in the air for a bit, but it eludes Malan at mid-wicket. Was a short of a length delive
full_text: Woakes to Naim, 2 runs, this was in the air for a bit, but it eludes Malan at mid-wicket. Was a short of a length delivery and Naim played an uppish flick, gets away with it as Malan's leap is not going to help. A couple of runs more

short_text: Woakes to Naim, no run, not enough width to play with, very close to the body as Naim stays rooted on his back foot and
full_text: Woakes to Naim, no run, not enough width to play with, very close to the body as Naim stays rooted on his back foot and punches it in front of cover

short_text: Woakes to Naim, no run, hits this on back of a length, hint of movement off the deck, Naim stands tall and pats it back
full_text: Woakes to Naim, no run, hits this on back of a length, hint of movement off the deck, Naim stands tall and pats it back to the bowler

short_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, , Liton Das decides to use his feet again, gets to the pitch of the ball and spanks it uppishly,
full_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, , Liton Das decides to use his feet again, gets to the pitch of the ball and spanks it uppishly, gets it past the fielder at cover and that's back-to-back boundaries for the right handed opener

short_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, , Liton Das puts on his dancing shoes, gets to the pitch of the ball and lofts it right over the
full_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, , Liton Das puts on his dancing shoes, gets to the pitch of the ball and lofts it right over the bowler's head for a rollicking boundary

full_text: Moeen Ali to Naim, 1 run, darted on middle and leg, Naim clips it towards square leg and ambles across to the other end, he's off the mark on the first ball he faces

full_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, 1 run, tossed up delivery by Moeen Ali, doesn't spin, goes straight and Liton Das opens his account with a gentle nudge through mid-wicket

full_text: Moeen Ali to Liton Das, no run, Turns into Liton Das who rocks back and punches this in front of cover

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Bairstow, , an emphatic shot brings about an even more emphatic win! It is their second win on the bou
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Bairstow, , an emphatic shot brings about an even more emphatic win! It is their second win on the bounce and Bangladesh are yet to open their account and their NRR also has taken a beating

full_text: Mustafizur to Bairstow, 1 run, closes the face of the bat and nudges it away into the on-side for a single

full_text: Mustafizur to Malan, 1 run, punchy push off the back foot and the man at point dives only for the ball to bobble up. A misfield allows the single

short_text: Mustafizur to Malan, , and they get nearer to the target. Short, wide, slammed over cover. That was hit with power and o
full_text: Mustafizur to Malan, , and they get nearer to the target. Short, wide, slammed over cover. That was hit with power and over the fielder. Only a shot away now from a win. Mustafizur hasn't had a great day

full_text: Shoriful Islam to Roy, Caught by Nasum Ahmed!! archs back, looks to guide it away but ends up finding the man at deep third man. Just used the pace of the bowler but ended up straight into the hands. End of a fine knock from Roy. He batted really well and in his attempt of finishing it early, Roy is gone.

full_text: Shoriful Islam to Roy, , can't really admire the daredevilry enough of this man! Got inside the line of that short slower ball by walking across and then help yourself shot. More of a paddle and that went all the way

full_text: Mahedi Hasan to Roy, , stays back and smashes the cut for a four. Got enough venom on the shot to get it behind square for a four. Roy and England racing away with this

full_text: Mahedi Hasan to Roy, , just palmed over the fence at long-on! Roy jumped down, got hold of the flighted ball and slammed it down the ground. The ball went really high and long enough. Only just as the man at long-on leapt up and parried it over

Was a full ball slanting away outside off, Roy came down the pitch and got into a tangle looking to flick it away

full_text: Nasum Ahmed to Buttler, Caught by Naim!! Lofts this off the back foot but can't get it wide of long-off. It's a very difficult shot he's attempting with the ball sliding in. Length ball on middle, Buttler goes back in the crease looking to hoist it over extra. Maybe played for a little bit of turn. But it skids on, and he miscues it. Long-off runs diagonally to the left, and takes a good catch.

full_text: Shakib to Buttler, , races to the pitch of the ball and lofts it straight back for six! It's a small chase and England are off to a brisk start

short_text: Shakib to Roy, 1 run, floated up just outside off, Roy slaps the drive to long-off
full_text: Shakib to Roy, 1 run, floated up just outside off, Roy slaps the drive to long-off

short_text: Shakib to Roy, no run, short outside off, slapped to cover
full_text: Shakib to Roy, no run, short outside off, slapped to cover

short_text: Shakib to Buttler, 1 run, flighted up on off, Buttler shovels it through square leg
full_text: Shakib to Buttler, 1 run, flighted up on off, Buttler shovels it through square leg

short_text: Mustafizur to Roy, , that's unlucky for Mustafizur. Roy's dragged it off a thick inside edge past short fine. Quite full
full_text: Mustafizur to Roy, , that's unlucky for Mustafizur. Roy's dragged it off a thick inside edge past short fine. Quite full, close to yorker length and Roy's looking to drive through cover. But maybe there's some shape back in

short_text: Mustafizur to Roy, , overpitched, floated up by Mustafizur and he's been duly put away. Roy punches it back down the gro
full_text: Mustafizur to Roy, , overpitched, floated up by Mustafizur and he's been duly put away. Roy punches it back down the ground with nice timing

short_text: Mustafizur to Roy, , yorker down leg, it's a wide
full_text: Mustafizur to Roy, , yorker down leg, it's a wide

short_text: Mustafizur to Buttler, leg byes, 1 run, full ball swinging in on leg, deflects off the pad through square leg as Buttler
full_text: Mustafizur to Buttler, leg byes, 1 run, full ball swinging in on leg, deflects off the pad through square leg as Buttler's late on it

short_text: Mustafizur to Buttler, no run, good length outside off, Buttler goes hard cross-batted and drags it into the on-side off
full_text: Mustafizur to Buttler, no run, good length outside off, Buttler goes hard cross-batted and drags it into the on-side off the inside half. Wanted to drive through cover

short_text: Mustafizur to Buttler, no run, pitched up with a hint of inswing, Buttler drives to mid-off
full_text: Mustafizur to Buttler, no run, pitched up with a hint of inswing, Buttler drives to mid-off

short_text: Mustafizur to Roy, leg byes, 1 run, that's close. Must be. The umpire doesn't think so. Just a hint of shape back in, bu
full_text: Mustafizur to Roy, leg byes, 1 run, that's close. Must be. The umpire doesn't think so. Just a hint of shape back in, but it may have pitched outside leg before hitting Roy on the pad. Good call from the umpire. There's a shy at the non-striker's end which results in an overthrow

short_text: Shakib to Buttler, no run, pushed to extra cover
full_text: Shakib to Buttler, no run, pushed to extra cover

short_text: Shakib to Roy, 1 run, driven to long-off as Shakib floats it up
full_text: Shakib to Roy, 1 run, driven to long-off as Shakib floats it up

short_text: Shakib to Buttler, 1 run, sliding in on middle and leg, Buttler tucks it through square leg
full_text: Shakib to Buttler, 1 run, sliding in on middle and leg, Buttler tucks it through square leg

short_text: Shakib to Buttler, no run, length ball sliding on just outside off, Buttler pushes to cover
full_text: Shakib to Buttler, no run, length ball sliding on just outside off, Buttler pushes to cover

short_text: Shakib to Roy, 1 run, punches this wide of mid-off
full_text: Shakib to Roy, 1 run, punches this wide of mid-off

short_text: Shakib to Roy, , oh it's a poor start from Shakib. Slow and short and wide, Roy waits on it and slaps it through point
